purpose: Regression fixtures for the accepted QQQ Clean Fast Break gap-context threshold fixture set. These fixtures are data-only and do not implement calculator logic, fill evidence, choose trades, backtest, calculate P&L, prove profitability, or mark a candidate ready.

threshold_rule.status_basis: absolute gap percent after source-backed QQQ regular-session inputs and no-hindsight clipping are proven
threshold_rule.unknown: missing or unproven required inputs, source/session identity, symbol match, timestamp parsing, no-hindsight clipping, or threshold fixture metadata

fixtures.reason: Clean example: exactly +0.30% is inclusive on the lower-risk side and remains clean when no-hindsight clipping is proven.
Caution lower-boundary example: just above 0.30% must classify as caution after required inputs and no-hindsight clipping are proven.
Caution upper-boundary example: exactly 0.75% remains caution because the fail threshold begins above 0.75%.
Fail example: just above 0.75% must classify as fail after required inputs and no-hindsight clipping are proven.
Unknown missing previous close: missing prior regular-session close blocks gap amount, gap percent, and completed evidence validation.
Unknown missing signal-day open: missing first regular-session opening candle blocks gap amount, gap percent, and completed evidence validation.
Future-data rejection example: adding, changing, or deleting the first post-signal 13:30 candle must not change setup-time gap amount, percent, status, as-of, or reviewed-before-signal.

Known QQQ 2026-04-13 fixture: previous regular-session close 611.02 and signal-day open 609.455 produce about -0.2561%, which is clean under the accepted first fixture threshold set only after no-hindsight regression proof.

explicit_non_goals: No calculator logic is created by this fixture file.
No evidence package row is filled by this fixture file.
No backtest, trade selection, P&L, proof, profitability, readiness, live, broker, order, account, or Railway behavior is authorized by this fixture file.
